---
title: "Henrietta’s Wish, or, Domineering: A Tale.  By the author of  “Scenes and Characters”. "
---

## Henrietta’s Wish, or, Domineering: A Tale.  By the author of  “Scenes and Characters”. 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1850
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Joseph Masters, Aldersgate Street, and New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
